name: trendfinder
description: Trend data → content decisions in Cowork, now with a guided end-to-end journey. The journey coach detects where you are (avatar? trends? open scripts?) and walks you avatar → scrape → trends → content-plan → script → review, one recommended click at a time. Avatar-first onboarding (Trendfinder API key, Apify MCP connector for on-demand scrapes, describe an avatar → niche(s) with AI-derived scrape topics, no hand-typed hashtags, optional 24/7 schedules); content-plan proposes ideas from avatar DNA + live trends and saves them to the shared content board (same content_pieces the web frontend uses); script-studio writes avatar-voiced hooks + scripts natively, shows the full script in chat before any approval, and persists them (stage idea → script); review renders each complete script before its approve/reject decision (stage → done); plus trend-radar, trend-briefing (Live Artifact), scheduling, avatar-studio, and the Trendfinder-Cockpit with Trends, Avatare and Content tabs — scripts in full text, full avatar DNA and full trend-cluster details (description, hook examples, hashtags, engagement), all expandable, so the web frontend is never needed. The Cockpit lives as a visible Trendfinder-Cockpit.html in the workspace root and is auto-regenerated after every board change (script saved, approved, ideas added). Every user choice — avatar, trend, Ziel, approval, next steps — renders as a clickable select-block (AskUserQuestion), never a typed number. AI synthesis runs natively in Cowork; the backend only stores and scrapes.
